mapper.select: select id, policy_code, cast(config_json as char) as config_json, status from security_policies order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into security_policies(policy_type, policy_code, config_json, status) values('DEFAULT', #{policyCode}, #{configJson}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, level, title, status from alerts order by id desc
select count(1) from alerts where status = 'OPEN'
mapper.insert: insert into cache_records(cache_key, cache_type, status) values(#{cacheKey}, #{cacheType}, 'EVICTED') on duplicate key update status = 'EVICTED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: select round(100.0 * sum(case when status = 'ACTIVE' then 1 else 0 end) / nullif(count(*), 0), 2) from cache_records
